modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help organizing email folders in Outlook

full_description_text:
- I’m trying to figure out how to set up my email folders in Outlook.  
- I want to create a good structure so I can find my emails easily.  
- Can someone guide me on how to do this?
short_description: Need help organizing email folders in Outlook
description:
- I’m trying to figure out how to set up my email folders in Outlook.  
- I want to create a good structure so I can find my emails easily.  
- Can someone guide me on how to do this?
